B. Admission (2023)

Section B1: Applicants and Registrants by Program, 2022 

Full-time, first-year applicants and registrants in first entry programs by type and program, Fall 2022:

Biological & Biomedical Sciences

  Applicants / Registrants
who attended an
Ontario Secondary
School in the previous year		 All Other Applicants / Registrants
(Non-Secondary School)		 Total
Total applicants (first choice) 240 56 296
Total registrants (first choice) 97 * 105
Total applications (all choices) 1,126 271 1,397
Total registrants (all choices) 212 7 219

Note: To ensure confidentiality, cell counts less than or equal to 5 are suppressed and displayed as "*". If only one cell in a row is suppressed, the TOTAL is rounded to the nearest 3.


Section B2: Program Undergraduate Admission Requirements

General information on universities’ programs, including admission requirements, can be found at OUAC’s eINFO.

For detailed information and up-to-date policy on admission requirements please visit the Academic Calendar

 

Section B3: Secondary School Entering Averages of Full-Time, First Year Students by Range and Program, Fall 2022 

The following tables show the percentage of full-time, first-year students by range and program. Averages are based on final grades for Grade 12 university destination courses.

 

Biological & Biomedical Sciences

Entering Average % of Students
95%+ 24.5
Between 90% and 94% 30.7
Between 85% and 89% 25.5
Between 80% and 84% 11.3
Between 75% and 79% 7.1
Between 70% and 74% 0.9
Below 70% 0
Overall Average 89.7

Commerce/Mgmt/Business Admin

Entering Average % of Students
95%+ 8.7
Between 90% and 94% 26.7
Between 85% and 89% 26.2
Between 80% and 84% 19.2
Between 75% and 79% 15.7
Between 70% and 74% 3.5
Below 70% 0.0
Overall Average 86.0

Computer & Information Science

Entering Average % of Students
95%+ 9.6
Between 90% and 94% 22.8
Between 85% and 89% 25.0
Between 80% and 84% 21.3
Between 75% and 79% 14.7
Between 70% and 74% 5.9
Below 70% 0.7
Overall Average 85.4

Notes:

  • To ensure confidentiality, cell counts less than or equal to 5 are suppressed and displayed as "*".
  • Program categories are based on OUAC program groupings and may not correspond to other program categories in the Common University Data Ontario dataset.

Source: OUAC 

 

Sections B4/B5/B6: Application fee / Students accepted for a term other than Fall / Deferred admission

 

Application Fees

2022-2023 application fees charged by OUAC

Fee Applicants who attended an 
Ontario Secondary School
in the previous year		 All Other Applicants (Non-Secondary School)
Application $150.00 $156.00
Additional Choices $50.00 $50.00
Application (if outside Canada) $160.00 $166.00

Note: The 'application' fee applies to the initial three university/program choices. The 'additional choices' fee must be paid for each university/program choice beyond the initial three.

Source: OUAC

 

Admission in Winter, Spring, Summer terms

 

Are first-year students accepted for terms other than the fall? Yes

Please note that acceptance for terms other than fall may vary by program.

Additional Note: Please direct any questions or concerns to oia@uwindsor.ca

 

Deferred Admission

 

Does your institution allow students to postpone enrolment after admission? No
If yes, maximum period of postponement NA

Please note that the policy on deferred admission may vary by program

Additional Note: Please direct any questions or concerns to oia@uwindsor.ca
